text.title: A/B Testing Basics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the ab-testing-basics methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: pre-register
step.action: Write experiment_definition.json with hypothesis, variants, metric, MDE, power, target_sample_size.

step.name: compute-sample-size
step.action: Use the standard two-proportion z-test sample size formula. Round up.

step.name: implement-bucketing
step.action: Wire deterministic hash bucketing. Add a unit test asserting stability across runs.

step.name: ramp-and-monitor
step.action: Ramp 1% → 5% → 25% → 50%; watch guardrails (latency, error rate). Abort on >=10% regression.

step.name: analyze-and-decide
step.action: Run analyzer (see ab-testing-implementation); decide ship/kill on primary metric only.
step.decision-gate: Do not ship if guardrails regressed.
